use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and pages
Destructive action buttons with visual warning styling
Secondary or tertiary actions within UI compositions
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and controls
ai_summary: A React button component built with Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for variant management. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Features standard accessibility states including focus-visible outlines, hover effects, and disabled states. Uses subtle shadow styling for depth and is designed as a reusable atomic component for any UI design system.
